title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at FitOn Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at FitOn Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with FitOn Holdings Services! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About FitOn Holdings Services:
FitOn Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FitOn Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
